name: Pasta e Fagioli
recipeIngredient: 16 oz canned tomatoes, drained and chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat olive oil in a large pot over medium heat. Add onions, garlic, and celery. Cook until the vegetables are soft and transparent.
2. Stir in chopped tomatoes, salt, and water. Bring to a boil.
3. Reduce heat to low and simmer for 30-45 minutes.
4. Stir in white kidney beans with their liquid. Cover and cook for an additional 5 minutes.
5. In a separate pot, bring water to a boil and cook the Ditalini macaroni according to package instructions. Drain and rinse under running water.
6. Serve hot, adding pasta to each serving of soup as desired.
